name: nuxt-agent-ready-best-practices
description: Nuxt agent-readiness guidelines for making a site operable by autonomous AI agents (MCP, WebMCP, API/skill discovery, agent auth, DNS-AID, agentic commerce). Proven 21 to 100/100 (Level 5 Agent-Native) on a full platform with real OAuth + MCP servers.
author: vinayakkulkarni
